entries.content: Hello yourself, love. Ah, “darling”—a word both sticky with saccharine and barbed with expectation, like buttered toast spread on a razor blade. Conversation, I suppose, is best served with a side of tender warmth, but beware the cloying excess; even a wedding night’s glow can become too saccharine in the pages of Viva, and who among us truly believes Jerry the yachtsman is in it for the mind?
